user.description: Host of "The Reasonable Contractor" Podcast | AI Websites - $2,500 - 48 Hour Delivery | I speak construction & code 🔨
user.name: Reasonable Tech Dad

tweets.text:
I gave an AI agent 25 minutes to do my Target grocery run. It burned $35 in credits and got 12 of 19 items in the cart.

I had the whole thing set up for success too...my shopping list in Markdown, my eating schedule, the kids' groceries, all of it. The problem? The agent https://t.co/cpSm1bE9rz
tweets.name: Reasonable Tech Dad
